_categories.confirmed_wreck: Location documented by historical record, NOAA chart, or dive survey. Used for detection validation.
_categories.search_area: Area of interest where a wreck may exist — location unconfirmed. Flagged for further examination.
_categories.training: Wreck used as ground-truth training data for sensor calibration and model validation.

lumberman.name: Lumberman
lumberman.training_notes: Ground-truth wreck for sensor calibration. Steel hull at 50ft provides strong thermal + optical + SAR returns. Use B02 Blue band (not NIR) — 50ft still within blue penetration depth. Confirmed dive survey.

andaste.name: Andaste
andaste.search_notes: Area of interest for further examination. Historical record places sinking in this general zone but exact location unconfirmed. Steel hull at 450ft — use SAR (corner reflector) + B02 Blue + thermal. Priority target.

gilcher.name: Gilcher
gilcher.search_notes: Suggested area for further examination. Wreck may be located in this zone — needs primary survey. Wooden hull at 220ft may have low SAR return; rely on thermal anomaly + B02 Blue. Secondary priority.

cedarville.name: Cedarville
cedarville.location_desc: SE of Mackinac Bridge; stern 45d47.325N/84d40.321W bow 45d47.247N/84d40.272W

maitland.name: Maitland
maitland.location_desc: West of bridge mid-channel; alt 45d48.20N/84d52.29W or 45d48.06N/84d42.09W

newell_eddy.name: Newell Eddy
newell_eddy.location_desc: Eastern Straits near Bois Blanc Island

st_andrew.name: Unknown (ex-St. Andrew site)
st_andrew.identity_notes: Long assumed St. Andrew, but the real St. Andrew and Peshtigo were positively identified in 2019 bow-to-bow near Beaver Island (Lake Michigan). A stepping coin dated 1857 found in mast step; current candidate vessel launched 1855. Identity actively under investigation.
st_andrew.condition: Upright, fairly broken up. Centerboard, windlass, and major hull sections present. Deck has fallen to the side; hull sides falling over.
st_andrew.location_desc: Lake Huron, 11 miles SE of Mackinac Bridge. Mooring buoy installed late-May to mid-September.

william_barnum.name: William H. Barnum
william_barnum.location_desc: SE of bridge off Mackinaw City; alt 45d44.42N/84d37.53W

william_young.name: William Young
william_young.location_desc: East of bridge off upper shore
